summary: Joel announces that he has moved Joel on Software to a new server at a colocation facility operated by Peer 1 Network. He mentions learning about web hosting in the process and links to a separate article describing the experience in detail. The post itself is purely an announcement with no substantive content.
key_points: Joel migrated his blog to a new colocation hosting provider (Peer 1 Network)
He wrote a separate detailed article about what he learned about web hosting
money_quotes: In the process of finding a new home and getting it up and running I've learned quite a bit about how web hosting works.
key_insight: This is a brief announcement post linking to a longer article about web hosting infrastructure.
